expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md cites authoritative sources stating/implementing the rule: skill_snapshot/README.md says developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md is “derived from P1 and [ANALOG-GATE] scenarios during Phase 7”, and result.md further cites skill_snapshot/scripts/lib/finalPlanSummary.mjs where extractDeveloperSmokeRows() “filters to isP1 || isAnalogGate”.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly ties the checklist to Phase 7: “the checklist artifact is defined and generated as part of Phase 7 deliverables”, and execution_notes.md lists Phase 7 responsibilities and artifacts from skill_snapshot/SKILL.md and skill_snapshot/reference.md (Phase 7 gate + finalPlanSummary.mjs generation).
